dialog.promptPlaceholder: You are a marketing agent for…
dialog.addAgentTitle: Add an agent to your team
dialog.addAgentDescription: Pick a specialist from the library. You can edit its name, role, and instructions after it's added.

workspace.instructionsPlaceholder: Write markdown for this agent's instructions.
workspace.instructionsBodyPlaceholder: Define how this agent should work inside Cabinet and the KB.
workspace.viewOrgChart: View this team as an org chart (opens fullscreen)
workspace.heartbeatsOnAgentPage: Heartbeats are configured on each agent's page
workspace.lockedHeartbeatTip: This agent is stopped. Start it on the Agents tab to enable the heartbeat.
workspace.lockedRoutineTip: This agent is stopped. Start it on the Agents tab to enable its routines.

detail.sharedAcrossCabinetsHint: Shared across all cabinets — edits apply everywhere
detail.notInCatalog: Not found in catalog — click to remove
detail.recommendedForRole: Recommended for this role — click to attach

missionControl.describePlaceholder: I need an agent that monitors Hacker News for GPU-related posts and writes thoughtful comments linking to our blog posts…

routine.runNowTitle: Run this routine now (one-off, outside its schedule)
routine.promptPlaceholder: What should this routine do? e.g. Summarize yesterday's activity…

tasksBoard.title: Tasks
tasksBoard.viewKanbanHint: Board view — tasks grouped into Inbox / Your turn / Running / Just Finished / Archive
tasksBoard.viewListHint: Flat list of every task, newest activity first
tasksBoard.viewScheduleHint: Calendar of scheduled routines and upcoming runs
tasksBoard.noToDeleteFiltered: Nothing matches {{filter}}. Clear the filter, pick another view, or create a new task.
tasksBoard.noToDeleteEmpty: There are no tasks on the board yet. Create one with the + New Task button.
tasksBoard.deleteBody: This permanently removes conversation meta, transcripts, and artifacts for every task currently shown. This can't be undone.
tasksBoard.deleteBodyFiltered: This permanently removes conversation meta, transcripts, and artifacts for every task currently shown by the active filters. This can't be undone.
tasksBoard.nothingToDelete: Nothing to delete in this view

runtime.nativeTranscriptTitle: Cabinet's native transcript — structured JSON stream, artifacts, summary, the full UX
runtime.ptyWarningTitle: Requires an OpenAI API key. Not available on ChatGPT-plan Codex accounts — picking this model will fail with 'model not supported when using Codex with a ChatGPT account'.
runtime.terminalTitle: Run the CLI in a live PTY terminal session (experimental hacker mode)
runtime.triggerSystemDefault: Task model — using system default (click to pick)
runtime.clickToLaunch: Click to launch {{name}} in a PTY terminal

breakingChanges.iAccept: I have read and I accept

skillAdd.auditTooltip: Result from skills.sh's external audits (Alibaba Threat Hunter, Socket, Snyk, zeroleaks)
skillAdd.auditUnavailable: skills.sh audit data isn't available for this skill

kanban.stopAllInLane: Stop all running tasks in this lane
kanban.restartAllInLane: Restart all tasks in this lane
kanban.laneInboxHint: Drafted — waiting for you to start
kanban.laneNeedsHint: Agent asked a question or needs approval

skillLibrary.noUpstream: Authored directly in this cabinet — no upstream git source recorded
skillLibrary.executableWarning: Bundle includes executable scripts — review before approving

embedPopover.placeholder: Paste a link (YouTube, X, Vimeo, Loom, TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, Spotify, or any URL)

rowActions.restartHint: Run again from the original prompt
rowActions.reassignHint: Hand this task off to a different agent

scheduleTab.explainer1: Everything your team is doing this week, on one calendar. Pink is a heartbeat, green is a routine. Click any pill to edit it.
scheduleTab.explainer2: Use this tab to spot conflicts, find quiet stretches, or just see at a glance how busy the team is.

helpPage.title: Help
helpPage.heading: Learn how Cabinet works
helpPage.subheading: Short demos, walkthroughs, and previews for getting the most out of Cabinet.
helpPage.discordHeading: Didn't find what you're looking for?
helpPage.discordSubheading: We're in the Discord — come say hi, ask questions, share what you're building.

tour.title: Meet your <accent>Cabinet</accent>.
tour.description: Your AI team. Your knowledge base. One place.

agents.title: Your <accent>AI team</accent>.
agents.description: Hire leads and specialists. Group them into departments. Let them dispatch work to each other.

tasks.title: The <accent>task board</accent>.
tasks.description: Kanban, list, and schedule views. Filter by agent or status. Pick a runtime per task.

knowledge.title: Your <accent>knowledge base</accent>.
knowledge.description: Markdown, CSV, PDF, code, notebooks, mermaid, images, audio — everything renders inline. Your data stays on your machine; it's yours, not ours.

cabinets.title: A team of <accent>AI teams</accent>.
cabinets.description: Cabinets nest inside cabinets. Each one is its own AI team with its own data, agents, and visibility scope — and they can collaborate up and down the tree.

routines.title: <accent>Routines</accent> & schedules.
routines.description: Run a task daily at 9am, weekly on Friday, or once next Monday. Cron, calendar, or natural language.

conversations.title: Conversations & <accent>approvals</accent>.
conversations.description: Agents propose actions — launch a task, schedule a job — and you approve before anything runs.

themes.title: Make it <accent>yours</accent>.
themes.description: Pick from a curated set of light and dark themes — Paper, Slate, Claude, Ink, and more.

providers.title: <accent>BYOAI</accent> — bring your own AI.
providers.description: Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok, Codex, Cursor — bring whichever providers you already pay for. Pick a default, or override per task.

shortcuts.title: <accent>Keyboard</accent> shortcuts.
shortcuts.description: Every Cabinet shortcut on one searchable card. Press ? from anywhere to reopen it. Filter by name or key — passes for navigation, editing, tasks, panels, and slash commands.

skills.title: <accent>Skills</accent> for your agents.
skills.description: Installable Agent Skills — playbooks the model pulls in for a task. Install from GitHub or skills.sh, attach to a persona, or @-mention one in any composer for a single run.

apiKeysItem.title: <accent>API keys</accent> for your tools.
apiKeysItem.description: Plug in your OpenAI, Anthropic, or GitHub account once — every agent and skill in Cabinet will use it. You pay your own bills, use your own quota, no middleman.

integrations.title: <accent>MCP servers</accent> & integrations.
integrations.description: MCP servers, Slack, Telegram, Gmail, and Calendar OAuth — connect once and Cabinet handles the tokens. Coming soon.

slideDataCopy.paragraphPrefix: Markdown, PDFs, spreadsheets, slides, images, video, audio, linked repos, embedded web apps, Google Docs. Mention any of it with
slideDataCopy.secondParagraphPrefix: One place for everything — so you and your AI team read, edit, and ship from the

slideData.thailandCaption: View all your files in one place.
slideData.taxCaption: Tax 2026 — a live calculator web app, embedded right in your cabinet.
slideData.healthCaption: Vitamins & labs — a spreadsheet that feels like a page.
slideData.repoCaption: Codebases — link any Git repo, searchable by your agents.

slideTasks.typedCommand: Run 10 tasks, each writing a song, save to @Songs/
slideTasks.paragraphPrefix: Write a task. Run one, run ten, schedule them forever. Mention pages with
slideTasks.paragraphSuffix: , save output wherever you want. You're the director now.

slideAgents.personaBody: "Rigorous analyst. Cites sources. Flags conflicting claims."
slideAgents.paragraphSuffix: . Your AI agents get the work done, 24/7. Go be human — they'll handle the rest.

startWork.titleHeartbeat: Wake this agent on a schedule
startWork.modeInboxHint: Save to Inbox — start it when you're ready
startWork.modeRecurringHint: Run this prompt on a schedule
startWork.modeHeartbeatHint: Wake the agent on its own rhythm

feedback.rolePlaceholder: e.g. indie hacker, PM at a SaaS, design student, hobbyist…
feedback.starTooltipUnknown: Star Cabinet on GitHub — if it's useful to you, a star really helps
feedback.starTooltipWithCount: {{count}} GitHub stars — click to add yours
feedback.discordCta: Want to talk directly, or hang with other Cabinet members?
feedback.thanksBody: Your feedback shapes what gets built next.
feedback.copy2Lead: You've opened Cabinet a couple of times. Thank you! Cabinet is open source and just getting started, so what you say here actually changes what gets built next.
feedback.copy2Q1: What were you trying to do in Cabinet today?
feedback.copy2Q1Hint: One sentence is fine. What you opened it for, not what you wished it could do.
feedback.copy2Q2: Last time you wanted to do that, what did you use instead of Cabinet?
feedback.copy2Q2Hint: Any tool, app, or doc, even pen and paper.
feedback.copy6Lead: You're back, and that's the signal that matters most. I want to hear about the rough edges before you forget them.
feedback.copy6Q1: What were you trying to do in Cabinet today?
feedback.copy6Q2: What's the one thing that almost made you stop using Cabinet this week?
feedback.copy6Q2Hint: The thing that bugged you most. Be specific. "X was confusing" beats "the UX".

helpVisuals.agentReply: I'll dispatch the librarian and editor.

conversationLive.waitingFirstChunk: Waiting for the first output chunk…

pendingActions.approveAll: Approve and dispatch every action that has no hard blockers

narrowViewport.hintSuffix: wide. Some surfaces cramp at narrower widths.

skillCatalog.auditUnavailable: Audit data unavailable from skills.sh for this skill

rowActionsPlus.editHint: Edit this saved draft before it starts
rowActionsPlus.deleteHint: Delete permanently — this can't be undone

terminalExited.reconnect: Reconnect to the daemon and stream the raw PTY replay

cabinetsExtras.noAgentsConfigured: No agents configured for this cabinet yet.
cabinetsExtras.depthOwnDesc: Pages, agents, and tasks from this cabinet only.

composerExtras.skillAttached: Skill — attached to this run only
composerExtras.active: Active — wake the agent on this schedule
composerExtras.pickCliPty: Pick a CLI to spawn in a PTY:

breakingChangesPlus.iUnderstand: I understand and want to continue.

tinyExtras.helpMoreFind: Help more people find the community
tinyExtras.chatWithBuilders: Chat with the people building Cabinet

newCabinet.title: Create New Cabinet
newCabinet.subtitle: A cabinet is a workspace with its own agents, jobs, and knowledge.
newCabinet.namePlaceholder: e.g. My Startup, Marketing Team, Research Lab…

newCabinet.renameWarning: Cabinet names can't be renamed later (for now). Choose wisely.

quickActions.physicsApp: Build me a physics study app

home.composerDaemonDown: Agent daemon offline — restart to send

welcome.paragraph: Your Home is yours. Inside it, you'll set up rooms for different parts of your life: work, second brain, research, family. And every room has cabinets: your notes, your files, and an AI team quietly getting things done in the background.
welcome.heading: Welcome <accent>home</accent>

welcomeBack.heading: Welcome back
welcomeBack.subtitle: We found an existing cabinet here. Let's finish setting it up.

cabinetCreated.heading: Your cabinet has been created
cabinetCreated.subtitle: Everything is set up and ready to go.

cloud.alreadyOnList: You're already on the list — we'll be in touch.
cloud.aside: Cabinet Cloud is coming soon. Same product, none of the self-hosting plumbing.
cloud.description: Open your Cabinet from any device while your AI agents keep working — drafting, researching, organizing — even when your laptop is closed.
cloud.error: Something went wrong. Check the email and try again.
cloud.onList: You're on the list. We'll email you when Cabinet Cloud opens up.
cloud.title: Your Cabinet, anywhere. Your AI team, always on.
cloud.waitlistSubtitle: Connect from anywhere. Your AI team works 24/7.

discord.aside: If you want new features first and prefer 'come chat' over 'please submit a ticket,' this is your room.
discord.description: This is where feedback turns into features, screenshots turn into debates, and somebody usually finds the edge case before it finds you.
discord.title: Discord is where the good weirdness happens.

github.aside: Cabinet is open source. If you like the vision, help us spread the word.
github.description: A GitHub star helps more people discover Cabinet and join the community.
github.title: Help the Cabinet community grow

launch.disclaimerAccess: Agents run with full access. Cabinet uses --dangerously-skip-permissions (Claude Code) and equivalent flags in other providers. This is identical to running these CLI tools from your own terminal. Any MCP servers or tools you've configured may be invoked automatically by agents.
launch.disclaimerBackup: Back up your data regularly. Agents can read, write, and delete files across your KB and linked repos. Cabinet is not responsible for data loss. You are responsible for the AI providers you choose and their terms of service.
launch.disclaimerBeta: Beta software. Things may break. We ship fast. Breaking changes can land without notice.
launch.legalNotice: By continuing you agree to our <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy</privacy>. Cabinet is an <oss>open-source project</oss>.

provider.heading: Agent Provider
provider.openTerminalDetail: You'll need a terminal to run the next steps.
provider.openTerminalError: Could not open terminal automatically. Open your system terminal manually.
provider.subtitle: Cabinet needs an AI CLI to power your agents.
provider.verifyExplanation: Verify runs the provider's headless prompt end-to-end and classifies any failure so you know which step to revisit.

roomSetup.subtitle: What's this cabinet for? Each room comes with its own AI team.
roomSetup.heading: Pick a <accent>room</accent>

office.label: The Office
office.tagline: Run a business, startup, or side project.
office.descriptionPlaceholder: We make a podcast about AI startups

study.label: Study
study.tagline: Your second brain — writing, notes, personal assistant.
study.descriptionLabel: What areas of life do you want help with?
study.descriptionPlaceholder: Writing, email triage, calendar, habit tracking

lab.label: Research Lab
lab.descriptionLabel: What's your field or what are you researching?
lab.descriptionPlaceholder: Phenomenology, consciousness, teaching Intro to Philosophy

family-room.label: Family Room
family-room.descriptionLabel: Who lives here and what do you juggle?
family-room.descriptionPlaceholder: Two parents, three kids, two schools, one dog

blank.label: Blank Room
blank.tagline: Nothing yet. Bring your own agents, your own shape.
blank.descriptionPlaceholder: Anything — leave blank if you're not sure yet

greeting.office: Good morning team! Welcome to {{workspace}}. Let's hit the ground running.
greeting.study: Morning. Your second brain is online — welcome back to {{home}}.
greeting.lab: Research desk ready — "{{workspace}}". What are we digging into today?
greeting.family-room: Home HQ booting up — {{home}}. Let's get everyone where they need to be.
greeting.blank: Blank slate — "{{workspace}}". What do you want to build here, {{home}}?

replies.0: On it. I'll have a landscape overview ready by end of day.
replies.1: Already drafting a plan. I'll share it in #content shortly.
replies.2: Setting up the foundational workflows now. Looking good so far.

office.closing: Great energy everyone. Let's make this a strong first week.

replies.0: I'll triage the inbox and surface what needs you.
replies.1: Calendar looks clear until 3pm — good window for writing.
replies.2: I've linked three new notes to the 'Daily' index already.

study.closing: Good. Ping me when anything needs me — otherwise I'll stay out of your way.

replies.0: Pulling the latest paper on this now — draft summary in an hour.
replies.1: I'll sync the bibliography after this and flag duplicates.
replies.2: Lecture outline for Thursday is almost ready for review.

lab.closing: Keep me posted. I'll review whatever you push by end of day.

replies.0: Schedule looks clear after 4. Flagging overlapping drop-offs.
replies.1: Menu drafted for the week — grocery list is ready to review.
replies.2: Kids' activities synced. DnD night is still on for Friday.

family-room.closing: Thanks all. Ping me if anything shifts during the day.

replies.0: Got it. Ready whenever you are.

blank.closing: Whenever you're ready, tell us what to do.

team.subtitle: Each cabinet is an AI team — agents, tasks, and a shared knowledge base, working together as one.
team.heading: Build <accent>your</accent> team

language.title: Language
language.description: Changes language and reading direction. Existing pages keep their per-document direction.
language.moreLanguagesHint: Click any to tell us you'd like Cabinet in that language — we'll prioritize the most-requested ones.
language.requestSubmitted: Thanks! We've noted your request for {{language}}. We'll prioritize the most-asked languages.
language.requestFailed: Couldn't reach the server. Please try again in a moment.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeDescription: Choose a theme for the interface.
appearance.matchSystemDescription: Switch automatically with your OS appearance.
appearance.sidebarDescription: Configure how files are displayed in the sidebar.
appearance.showHiddenFilesHint: Display files and folders starting with a dot (e.g. .env, .git)

storage.dataDirectoryDescription: All Knowledge Base content is stored in this directory. Changing the path requires a restart.
storage.restartHint: The data directory will change after you restart Cabinet.
storage.envVarHint2: environment variable, which takes priority over this setting.

providers.title: Agent Providers
providers.subtitle: Configure AI agent providers. CLI agents run via terminal, API agents use direct API calls.
providers.defaultRuntimeHint: General conversations and fallback runs use this provider/model/effort.
providers.emptyMatrix: No providers are configured. Add one below.

notifications.channelsHint: Configure how you receive alerts when agents need your attention.
notifications.rulesHint: Notifications are triggered automatically for these events:
notifications.previewHint: Browser push, Telegram, Slack, and email notifications.
notifications.channelPushDesc: Instant alerts when Cabinet tab is open or PWA installed
notifications.channelTelegramDesc: Instant mobile notifications via Telegram bot
notifications.channelSlackDesc: Forward alerts to your team's Slack channel
notifications.channelEmailDesc: Batched summary of alerts and agent activity
notifications.ruleAlertsDesc: Any agent posting to the alerts channel
notifications.ruleMentionsDesc: When an agent mentions @human in any channel
notifications.ruleFloorDesc: A goal drops below its minimum threshold

about.tagline: AI-first self-hosted knowledge base and startup OS.
about.philosophy: All content lives as markdown files on disk. Humans define intent. Agents do the work. The knowledge base is the shared memory between both.
about.privacyBody: Cabinet sends anonymous usage telemetry to help us improve the product. No file contents, paths, prompts, or secrets are collected.
about.telemetryHint: Event counts, versions, and platform info only. Toggle off to stop sending.
about.cloudBody: Connect to your Cabinet from anywhere, while your AI team works 24/7 for you. Drop your email below and we'll let you know when Cabinet Cloud opens up.
about.cloudAlready: You're already on the list — we'll be in touch.
about.cloudSuccess: You're on the list. We'll email you when Cabinet Cloud opens up.
about.cloudError: Something went wrong. Check the email and try again.
about.connectBody: Get help, share feedback, or just say hi.

profile.title: Profile
profile.name: Name
profile.howAppear: How you appear in conversations and across the app.
profile.displayNameHint: Shown in conversations. Defaults to Name.
profile.iconHint: Used when no avatar image is set. Click again to clear.
profile.tintHint: Tints the fallback avatar when no image is set.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.name: Workspace name
workspace.subtitle: Captured during onboarding. Agents read these when planning work.

bar.askAiAriaLabel: Ask AI to edit this page

server.daemonDownNoProviders: Daemon is not responding; no agent providers available
server.appWorking: Pages, editor, search, and file management are working.
server.appDown: Pages, editor, search, and saving are unavailable. You can still read cached content.
server.daemonWorking: AI agents, scheduled jobs, and the web terminal are working.
server.daemonDownDescription: AI agents, scheduled jobs, and the web terminal are unavailable. Page editing still works.

save.retryTitle: Click to retry the failed save
save.editing: Editing — autosave will run when you pause
save.wordCountTitle: Word count for this page (markdown syntax excluded)

help.label: Help
help.starsAriaLabel: {{count}} GitHub stars — open Cabinet on GitHub
help.starsTitle: {{count}} GitHub stars — star Cabinet on GitHub
help.shareSubtitle: Copy an invite link & spread the word
help.shareCopied: You're awesome, {{name}} 🩷 Thank you for bringing future Cabinet members on board. Link copied, go share the love!

git2.uncommittedFilesAria: {{count}} uncommitted file(s) — click to see the list
git2.truncatedHint: Only the first {{count}} files shown — run `git status` for the full list.
git2.syncTitleWithLast: Pull latest from GitHub & refresh. Last synced {{when}}.
git2.syncAriaLabel: Pull latest changes from GitHub and refresh
git2.syncAriaLabelWithLast: Pull latest changes from GitHub and refresh. Last synced {{when}}.

common.openSettings: Open Settings to review the installed update

conversation.restartFromOriginal: Restart this task from the original prompt
conversation.gracefulExit: Gracefully close the CLI (writes /exit to the PTY)
conversation.sendSigterm: Send SIGTERM to the running PTY process
conversation.compactContext: Collapse prior turns into a digest to free context window
conversation.sessionEnded: Session ended — type to continue in the same terminal.
conversation.terminalLive: Terminal live. Your next prompt queues after this turn finishes.

tour.starterTask: Let's talk through my goals and what I want to achieve here, then capture it in a new About page.
tour.introSubtitle: Your AI team. Your knowledge base. One place.

update.description: Cabinet checks for releases automatically. While the product is still experimental, keep a copy of your data before installing updates.

daemon.fixHintElectron: Quit and relaunch Cabinet to restart the agent daemon.
daemon.fixHintDev: Run `npm run dev:daemon` (or restart `npm run dev:all`) to bring the agent daemon back up.
daemon.willFail: Agents, jobs, and AI requests will fail until it's back. {{fixHint}}
